title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: OREGON CITY PUBLIC LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, computers, restrooms, and a water fountain. 606 John Adams Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6:30pm, Saturday 10am-6pm, Sunday 10am-5pm (503) 657-8269 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 657-8269 Main phone Main phone (503) 657-8269 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead or visit website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 33 and 32 Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON CITY PUBLIC LIBRARY
